name: CrowdVLM-R1
role_in_system: High-capacity benchmark and transfer-learning source for dense crowd counting.
assumptions: Dense scenes benefit from large pretraining.
Camera viewpoint is stable enough for transfer learning.
failure_modes: Domain shift across stadium camera angles.
Overcounting under extreme occlusion or banners.
deployment_constraints: not ideal for low-latency edge devices

name: HMSTUNet
role_in_system: Generate spatial heatmaps for occupancy, hotspots, and safety overlays.
assumptions: Spatial density signal is preserved after perspective normalization.
Zones of interest are calibrated to camera view.
failure_modes: Blurred boundaries in overlapping queues.
Underestimation in severe lighting shifts.
deployment_constraints: requires calibration for best spatial fidelity

name: PET
role_in_system: Produce point-level person localization for occupancy mapping and weak supervision.
assumptions: Point annotations are cheaper and more scalable than full boxes in dense scenes.
failure_modes: Merged heads in extreme crowd compression.
Reduced precision for oblique views.

name: FFNet
role_in_system: Primary live count estimator for edge-side deployment.
assumptions: Real-time inference matters more than best-possible benchmark score.
failure_modes: Count drift in extremely dense gates.
Sensitivity to heavy weather artifacts.

name: Proactive Crowd Flow
role_in_system: Predict congestion build-up and identify operational intervention gaps before overload.
assumptions: Arrival patterns are partially predictable from event context and recent demand.
failure_modes: Sudden policy changes or security incidents break historical priors.
Forecast lag during abrupt gate closures.

name: YOLOv8
role_in_system: Live person detection for sparse-to-moderate density scenes and cross-checking counts.
assumptions: People remain individually separable in many stadium camera views.
failure_modes: Box collapse under dense occlusion.
False positives from flags, signs, or mascots.
deployment_constraints: requires resolution suited to person scale

name: Real-ESRGAN
role_in_system: Selective enhancement for low-resolution or compressed camera feeds.
assumptions: Enhancement can recover useful detail in degraded footage.
failure_modes: Hallucinated textures distort detector behavior.
Latency too high for always-on use.
deployment_constraints: best used on-demand or for selected cameras

name: B2BDet
role_in_system: Validate whether super-resolution improves or harms detector performance.
assumptions: Perception quality and detection utility are not always aligned.
failure_modes: Validation set too narrow to generalize.
False confidence from visually pleasing but incorrect enhancement.

name: Farneback Optical Flow
role_in_system: Estimate directional movement and local speed trends around gates and corridors.
assumptions: Short-horizon motion fields are informative for queue propagation.
failure_modes: Camera shake corrupts flow vectors.
Rain and reflections add noisy motion.

name: Fruin Level of Service
role_in_system: Convert density and movement into interpretable operator-facing pressure score.
assumptions: Physical crowding heuristics remain valuable when fused with modern CV signals.
failure_modes: Improper calibration of area or width inflates score error.
Ignores nuanced human behavior beyond density and flow.
deployment_constraints: rules must be tuned to local venue operations

name: GABPPO
role_in_system: Choose gate-level routing actions that reduce wait and pressure.
assumptions: Operational actions can be represented as discrete route recommendations.
failure_modes: Policy overfits to simulated gate graph behavior.
Recommendations degrade if upstream forecasts are poor.
deployment_constraints: best paired with simulation and safety constraints
